name: RunInfoUpdExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT concat(concat(USER_DEFN_LABEL_TX,'='),USER_DEFN_VAL_TX) AS PARLIST FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_JOB_PARM_SET WHERE FILE_PATH_ID = '@{pipeline().parameters.FilePath}' AND JOB_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.JobName}'

text.value: MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_JOB_PARM_SET AS T USING (SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.FilePath}' AS FILE_PATH_ID, '@{pipeline().parameters.JobName}' AS JOB_NM, CASE WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(@{pipeline().parameters.Label1}))) = 0 THEN '' ELSE @{pipeline().parameters.Label1} END AS USER_DEFN_LABEL_TX, CASE WHEN LEN(LTRIM(RTRIM(@{pipeline().parameters.Value1}))) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE @{pipeline().parameters.Value1} END AS USER_DEFN_VAL_TX) AS S ON T.FILE_PATH_ID = S.FILE_PATH_ID AND T.JOB_NM = S.JOB_NM AND T.USER_DEFN_LABEL_TX = S.USER_DEFN_LABEL_TX WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USER_DEFN_VAL_TX = S.USER_DEFN_VAL_TX WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (FILE_PATH_ID, JOB_NM, USER_DEFN_LABEL_TX, USER_DEFN_VAL_TX) VALUES (S.FILE_PATH_ID, S.JOB_NM, S.USER_DEFN_LABEL_TX, S.USER_DEFN_VAL_TX);

Description:
Â© Copyright 2021 Blue Cross/Blue Shield of Kansas City

JOB NAME: RunInfoExtr


DESCRIPTION:   Maintain DataStage run time information in a IDS table.  Based on PROCESSFUNCTION job will update one row in P_JOB_PARM_SET
                            or create output file with all parameters.

CALLED BY:  


INPUTS: 
        
ProcessFunction:
       START - Output DB2 table and input parameters to AIX file for DataStage consumption of run time information.  File will exist for job restarts.
       UPDATE - Update DB2 table for for one parameter row.
               

EMAIL FILES:  None


UNIX SCRIPTS USED:  None


DATABASE TABLES USED:
                 Database                    Table Name
                 ----------------------------       ---------------------------------------------------------------------
                 IDS_PROD                 P_JOB_PARM_SET

BCBSKC TRANSFORMS/ROUTINES USED: None


OUPUT:     Run information file #$FilePath#/runinfo/<JobName>.info


RERUN INFORMATION: 
             PREVIOUS RUN SUCCESSFUL:   Nothing to reset, just restart. 
             PREVIOUS RUN ABORTED:         Nothing to reset, just restart.

MODIFICATIONS:

----------------------------------      -------------------    -----------------------------------    ---------------------------------------------------------                              ----------------------------------   ---------------------------------    -------------------------   
Brent Leland                    09-23-2021     431876                           Initial creation                                                                  IntegrateDev1

Annotations:
Read / Update DataStage Run Information
#$FilePath#/runinfo/#JobName#.info
Update one label/value row
File used to set Control job run time parameters
